testcase.name: shouldLoginAndReturnToken
testcase.system-out:
14:34:59.466 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.demo.AuthControllerTest]: AuthControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:34:59.627 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.demo.ShareBazarBackendApplication for test class com.example.demo.AuthControllerTest

testcase.name: shouldReturn500WhenUserNotFound

error.message: Request processing failed: java.lang.RuntimeException: User not found
